title: Algerian Wrap
description: A flavorful Algerian-inspired wrap filled with spices and meat, perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet to medium-high heat (around 350°F or 175°C).
Brown the ground beef, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned and cooked through.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until it's translucent.
Add the Algerian spice mix, dynamite garlic powder, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the dense tomato paste to the skillet and stir to combine.
Simmer the mixture for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Warm a wrap in the microwave or in a dry skillet.
Spoon the beef mixture onto the wrap and serve hot.
Garnish with additional spices or herbs if desired.
